data.name: 除陰師
data.detailed_description:
◆故事


妖魔亂世中的千年宿命之戰——王朝末年，天機紊亂，陰陽裂隙崩裂，魑魅魍魎自幽冥湧出，肆虐人間。昔日繁華的皇城，如今已被「青龍將軍」以邪術獻祭，化作一座妖氣沖天的「血煞陣眼」。黑雲蔽日，血霧瀰漫，街道上游蕩著扭曲的妖物，而曾經輝煌的宮殿，如今成了邪祟的巢穴。

你是最後一代除陰師，肩負著千年傳承的符咒與祖傳法器。你必須突破被陰陽裂隙重塑的詭譎世界：妖窟深處蟄伏著上古邪祟，荒村廢寺暗藏噬魂陷阱，而那些墮落的術士與化形的精怪，更會在你逼近真相時發動致命伏擊……

這是一場融合道術與射擊的「Roguelike」征途。戰鬥瞬息萬變，你需在槍林彈雨中閃避敵人的攻擊，同時瞬發符咒，制定應敵戰略。每一次抉擇，都可能影響命運的走向。在這條兇險之路上，三位性格迥異的女主角將在命運節點與你交匯，同時將會揭開她們不為人知的另一面。
-小蘭，表面是冷傲的刺客，實則是貪吃的活潑少女。她擅長暗殺術，卻會偷偷往嘴裡塞包子。


-克莉絲汀，金髮碧眼的西洋槍手，看似冷豔疏離，實則重情重義。她手中的燧發槍能貫穿妖邪，而她的過去，卻與這場災劫有著千絲萬縷的聯繫。


-紅，來歷不明的九尾狐妖，總是一副孤傲的模樣，但真相是——她只是經常在放空發呆。她的妖力強大，卻對你抱有難以言喻的信任。


當她們的「命契力量」被你逐一喚醒，青龍將軍以陰氣煉陣的真相也將浮出水面。最終，你必須在皇城中心的血煞陣眼與他決戰，以符咒封印陰氣，拯救蒼生。然而，輪迴的盡頭，等待你的究竟是救贖，還是另一場更大的陰謀？

——你的選擇，將斬斷這血煞因果。

◆玩法

踏入陰陽妖魔之境，以符咒、法器和秘術展開快節奏射擊，搭配「Roguelike」的戰略抉擇能力加強，在瞬息萬變的戰場上斬妖除穢。死亡並非終結，每次輪迴都能累積經驗，挑戰更強的邪祟。三位女角色可結為羈絆，透過「Live2D情色互動」觸發「陰陽雙修」，強化技能並解鎖隱藏劇情。策略搭配角色特性，在慾念與殺伐之間，尋求破劫之道！

◆遊戲特色

◇12則Live2D情色動畫
◇遊戲文字4萬字
◇三位不同魅力的女角
◇ Roguelike 快節奏射擊，陰陽師奇幻故事劇情，Live2D情色動畫
◇遊戲結局：1種

◇ Roguelike 快節奏射擊，陰陽師奇幻故事劇情，Live2D情色動畫

data.short_description: 妖魔橫行的亂世，身為最後一代「除陰師」的你，手持千年符咒與秘傳法器，踏上試煉之路。 透過性交淨化被魔物洗腦，性命危在旦夕的三位女角，締結生死約，成為夥伴共同對抗敵人。 結合「Roguelike」的戰略抉擇與快節奏射擊，你必須在生死一瞬間施展符法、佈陣破敵，以「必殺技」逆轉絕境。 戰火與慾念交織，精彩的全Live2D劇情動態。 你準備好墜入這修羅場了嗎？
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 5 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

data.name: YIN YANG SEX
data.detailed_description:
◆Story

A thousand-year karmic war unfolds in a world consumed by chaos.

As the dynasty crumbles and the balance of fate collapses, the rift between Yin and Yang shatters. Malevolent spirits pour forth from the underworld, bringing terror and corruption to the human realm.

Once a flourishing imperial capital, the city now lies cursed—sacrificed through dark rituals by the traitorous General Azure Dragon, transforming into a demonic vortex known as the Bloodshade Core.

Dark clouds blot out the sun, blood mist fills the air, and grotesque demons prowl the streets. The once-glorious palace now stands as a nest of evil.

You are the last surviving Exorcist of Shadows, the final bearer of ancient talismans and ancestral relics passed down through a thousand years.

To fulfill your destiny, you must break through a twisted world reshaped by the shattered Yin-Yang rift—where ancient evils slumber deep within demon lairs, soul-devouring traps lie hidden in ruined villages and forgotten temples, and fallen sorcerers or shape-shifting spirits lie in wait to strike when you draw too close to the truth...

This is a Roguelike journey where Daoist sorcery meets bullet hell action.

In ever-shifting battles, you must dodge through waves of enemy fire, unleash talismans in a flash, and craft strategies on the fly. Every choice you make can alter the course of fate.

Along this perilous path, three heroines—each with their own distinct personalities—will cross your destiny. As bonds deepen, hidden sides of their stories will slowly be revealed...

Xiao Lan
A cold and aloof assassin on the surface, but secretly a lively girl with an insatiable appetite.
Skilled in the art of silent killing—but more than once, you’ll catch her sneaking a steamed bun into her mouth mid-mission.


Christine
A blonde, blue-eyed Western gunslinger. She appears distant and composed, but beneath that icy exterior lies a heart deeply loyal to those she trusts.
Her flintlock pistol can pierce through demonic armor—and her mysterious past may be tied to the origins of this very catastrophe.


Hong
A nine-tailed fox spirit with an unknown origin. Though she carries herself with noble pride, the truth is... she’s often just zoning out.
Her demonic powers are immense, yet for some reason, she harbors an unspoken trust in you.


As you awaken the Soulbound Powers within each heroine, the dark truth behind General Azure Dragon’s sinister ritual begins to surface.

In the heart of the imperial capital, you must face him in a final battle at the Bloodshade Core—sealing the corrupted qi with ancient talismans and saving the world from collapse.

But at the end of this cycle...
Will you find salvation—
or uncover a deeper, far more insidious conspiracy?

—Your choices will sever the karmic chains of blood and darkness.

◆Gameplay

Step into the realm of onmyoji and demons, unleashing fast-paced shooting with talismans, sacred relics, and secret arts. Combine strategic choices in true Roguelike fashion to vanquish evil on ever-changing battlefields. Death is not the end — every reincarnation grants experience to face stronger malevolent forces.

Form bonds with three heroines and trigger “Yin-Yang Dual Cultivation” through erotic Live2D interactions, enhancing skills and unlocking hidden stories. Strategically leverage each character’s traits to navigate the path between desire and destruction, seeking the way to break the curse!

◆Game Features

◇ 12 Live2D Erotic Animations
◇ 40,000 Words of Game Text
◇ Three Female Characters, Each with Unique Charm
◇ Roguelike Fast-Paced Shooter with a Fantasy Onmyoji Storyline and Live2D Erotic Animations
◇ Game Ending: 1 Type

data.short_description: Purify three brainwashed heroines through sacred intercourse before darkness claims them. Forge life-or-death bonds and fight together. Dive into Roguelike strategy fused with fast-paced shooting, where lust and war clash in fully animated Live2D scenes. Are you ready to enter this hellish battlefield?
data.supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN10/WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 5 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN10/WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
